headline: Removing Safety Guardrails via Directional Ablation
lede: Heretic introduces a precise mechanism for model internal modification without heavy fine-tuning. By utilizing Optuna-optimized ablation, the framework balances model refusal suppression with logical integrity.

headline: Scalable Media Management with Seerr
lede: Seerr provides a robust backend solution for managing media services in a modern, automated environment. It delivers consistent performance and reliability for users building high-availability content libraries.

headline: Enforcing Engineering Discipline in Agentic Workflows
lede: Superpowers structures the agentic lifecycle by embedding rigorous development protocols directly into your IDE. By enforcing Socratic planning and strict test-driven development, it bridges the gap between simple code generation and professional-grade software execution.

headline: Automating Google Workspace from the Command Line
lede: Gogcli transforms the sprawling Google ecosystem into a programmable terminal interface. It offers a secure, script-friendly way to manage mail, calendars, and sheets without the friction of a browser.

headline: Efficient Vector Data Processing with Zvec
lede: Zvec streamlines the movement and management of high-dimensional data in modern AI stacks. Its architecture focuses on high-throughput connectivity to ensure your RAG systems remain performant and responsive.

headline: Unifying Self-Hosted Communication Agents
lede: OpenClaw provides a private, local-first control plane for your entire digital messaging footprint. By centralizing communication via a secure WebSocket architecture, it keeps your assistant interactions strictly under your own domain.

headline: Orchestrating Autonomous AI Operating Systems
lede: Aios-core runs quietly in the background, serving as the connective tissue for multi-agent intelligence. It is the persistent daemon your local infrastructure needs to sustain complex AI operations overnight.

headline: Curated Resources for System Design Mastery
lede: This collection serves as a definitive resource for engineers navigating the complexities of large-scale architecture. It gathers essential papers and guides required for mastering modern backend design patterns.

headline: Rapid Summarization Prototypes for Documents
lede: Summarize offers a quick, iterative way to distill lengthy technical documents into core insights. This proof-of-concept tool prioritizes speed and raw accessibility for developers on the go.

headline: Hummingbot Hits Major Deployment Milestone
lede: The Hummingbot ecosystem continues to scale, reaching a significant threshold in total project stars. This growth reflects the community's reliance on its high-frequency trading automation tools.
